title: In the Cold Dark Night
overview: Set in the heart of the American South, IN THE COLD DARK NIGHT examines both the 1983 and 2018 investigations into the murder of a Black man, Timothy Coggins.

trailers.title: IN THE COLD DARK NIGHT on ABC Friday July 17th at 9pm
